video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Mistfell (masculine guild crafter, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash marks on gloves) and Yuna Silverbrook (androgynous guild coordinator, formal cloak, composed posture); Yuna Mistfell steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Silverbrook guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot; after ten seconds Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark while Yuna Mistfell holds the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on tool usage and workshop tasks with no sexualized elements or physical harm.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is currently experiencing a bottleneck due to high demand for weapon repairs; the crafter and coordinator work together to streamline the process.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Successfully managed the forge bottleneck together.
Appreciated the crafter's expertise in clearing the repair queue.
